race.comment: TROOPER (2) proved the Maiden win was no fluke two-back at Canberra, with a dominant 6 len victory over this trip at Bathurst. Returned slick figures on that occasion and can go close again despite rising sharply in weight. AIRLINER (9) flew late in the heavy going first-up with a tough third over 1000m at Nowra. Tongue-tie comes off and looks set for a good prep. CIAO BELLA MIA (10) close to her top now third-up. Snagged back from the outside gate when she chipped away late to finish seventh over 1200m at Wagga. Top-three contender in a tricky race. GO GAZZA (12) returned to form in easier class with a dominant win over 1425m at this track. Kept fresh and not to be underestimated. THE ARROW (3) first run for the new yard after racing in tougher company in Victoria. Has a few gear changes and don't dismiss.
